name: CRC错误计数
note: 硬盘数据传输过程中循环冗余校验（CRC）失败的次数。

translation.name: CRC错误计数
translation.note: 硬盘数据传输过程中循环冗余校验（CRC）失败的次数，反映数据传输链路可靠性。

translation.name: SMART CRC Error Count
translation.note: The number of Cyclic Redundancy Check (CRC) failures during hard disk data transmission, reflecting the reliability of the data transmission link.

name: 端到端错误检测计数
note: 硬盘内部数据传输的端到端校验失败次数，关联固件或物理存储单元健康度。

translation.name: 端到端错误检测计数
translation.note: 硬盘内部数据传输的端到端校验失败次数，关联硬盘固件或物理存储单元健康度。

translation.name: SMART End-to-End Error Detection Count
translation.note: The number of end-to-end verification failures in internal hard disk data transmission, associated with the health of hard disk firmware or physical storage units.

name: 擦除失败计数
note: 固态硬盘（SSD）擦除闪存块时失败的次数，预示闪存芯片老化。

translation.name: 擦除失败计数
translation.note: 固态硬盘（SSD）擦除闪存块时失败的次数，过多可能预示闪存芯片老化或坏块增多。

translation.name: SMART Erase Fail Count
translation.note: The number of failures when a Solid State Drive (SSD) erases flash memory blocks; an excessive number may indicate flash chip aging or an increase in bad blocks.

name: 主机读取次数
note: 操作系统从硬盘读取数据的总次数，属于硬盘使用量统计指标。

translation.name: 主机读取次数
translation.note: 操作系统从硬盘读取数据的总次数，属于硬盘使用量统计指标，无直接故障预警意义。

translation.name: SMART Host Reads Count
translation.note: The total number of times the operating system reads data from the hard disk, which is a statistical indicator of hard disk usage with no direct fault warning significance.

name: 介质磨损百分比
note: 固态硬盘（SSD）专用指标，反映闪存芯片的磨损程度，100%表示完全磨损。

translation.name: 介质磨损百分比
translation.note: 固态硬盘（SSD）专用核心指标，反映闪存芯片的磨损程度，数值越接近100%寿命越短。

translation.name: SMART Media Wear Percentage
translation.note: A core indicator dedicated to Solid State Drives (SSDs) that reflects the wear level of flash memory chips; the closer the value is to 100%, the shorter the lifespan.

name: PLL失锁计数
note: 锁相环（PLL）时钟同步失锁的次数，异常可能导致数据传输不稳定。

translation.name: PLL失锁计数
translation.note: 硬盘时钟同步模块（锁相环PLL）失锁的次数，失锁会导致数据传输时序错乱。

translation.name: SMART PLL Lock Loss Count
translation.note: The number of times the hard disk clock synchronization module (Phase-Locked Loop, PLL) loses lock, which can cause data transmission timing errors.

name: 编程失败计数
note: 固态硬盘（SSD）向闪存块写入数据时失败的次数，反映闪存寿命。

translation.name: 编程失败计数
translation.note: 固态硬盘（SSD）向闪存块写入数据（编程操作）时失败的次数，是闪存健康度核心指标。

translation.name: SMART Program Fail Count
translation.note: The number of failures when a Solid State Drive (SSD) writes data (program operation) to flash memory blocks, which is a core indicator of flash memory health.

name: 重试缓冲区溢出计数
note: 硬盘读写失败后重试时，缓冲区溢出的次数，预示读写性能下降。

translation.name: 重试缓冲区溢出计数
translation.note: 硬盘读写操作失败后自动重试时，数据缓冲区出现溢出的次数，预示硬盘读写性能下降或硬件故障。

translation.name: SMART Retry Buffer Overflow Count
translation.note: The number of times the data buffer overflows when the hard disk automatically retries after a read/write failure, indicating a decline in hard disk read/write performance or hardware failure.

name: 热节流状态
note: 硬盘因温度过高触发自动降速保护的状态，1为已触发，0为未触发。

translation.name: 热节流状态
translation.note: 硬盘因温度过高触发自动降速保护的状态（1=已触发，0=未触发），触发后会导致读写速度变慢。

translation.name: SMART Thermal Throttle Status
translation.note: The state where the hard disk triggers automatic speed reduction protection due to high temperature (1=triggered, 0=not triggered), which will cause slow read/write speeds after triggering.

name: 定时工作负载计时器
note: 记录硬盘在特定负载模式下的运行累计时间，评估硬盘工作强度。

translation.name: 定时工作负载计时器
translation.note: 累计硬盘在预设负载模式下的运行时间，用于评估硬盘长期工作强度，辅助判断磨损速率。

translation.name: SMART Timed Workload Timer
translation.note: Accumulates the operating time of the hard disk in a preset load mode, used to evaluate the long-term working intensity of the hard disk and assist in judging the wear rate.

name: 磨损均衡计数
note: 固态硬盘（SSD）磨损均衡算法的执行次数，延长硬盘整体寿命。

translation.name: 磨损均衡计数
translation.note: 固态硬盘（SSD）专用指标，记录磨损均衡算法的执行次数，确保各闪存块磨损均匀以延长寿命。

translation.name: SMART Wear Leveling Count
translation.note: An indicator dedicated to Solid State Drives (SSDs) that records the number of executions of the wear leveling algorithm to ensure uniform wear of flash memory blocks and extend lifespan.

name: 设备退出状态
note: 硬盘SMART检测的退出状态码，0为正常完成，非0为检测异常。

translation.name: 设备退出状态
translation.note: 硬盘SMART自检的退出状态码，0=自检正常完成，非0值表示自检中断或异常。

translation.name: SMART Device Exit Status
translation.note: The exit status code of the hard disk SMART self-test; 0 means the self-test is completed normally, and a non-zero value indicates self-test interruption or abnormality.

name: 设备健康状态
note: 硬盘整体健康状态标识，1为健康，0为不健康。

translation.name: 设备健康状态
translation.note: 硬盘整体健康状态标识，1=健康（无故障预警），0=不健康（存在潜在故障）。

translation.name: SMART Device Health Status
translation.note: The overall health status identifier of the hard disk; 1=healthy (no fault warning), 0=unhealthy (potential faults exist).

name: 设备温度
note: 硬盘当前运行温度，主流硬盘安全工作范围为0-60℃。

translation.name: 设备温度
translation.note: 硬盘当前运行温度（单位℃），主流硬盘安全工作范围为0-60℃，长期超温会加速硬件老化。

translation.name: SMART Device Temperature
translation.note: The current operating temperature of the hard disk (in ℃); the safe operating range for mainstream hard disks is 0-60℃, and prolonged overheating will accelerate hardware aging.
